message.content:
Explore the ProfilePage notes section comprehensively. I need to understand the current design of `.profile-note-container` and all related note components/styles.

Find and read:
1. All CSS files related to notes in `client/src/components/ProfilePage/` - look for `.profile-note-container` and any related classes
2. The `ProfileNotesSection` component and all its child components (NoteContainer, NoteStyleEditor, InlineNoteEditor, ReadOnlyNoteView)
3. Any CSS files for these note components
4. The overall `myprofile.css` file to understand the existing design language

For each file, provide the full content or key relevant sections. I need to understand:
- Current layout (grid, flex, etc.)
- Current colors, borders, shadows
- Current typography
- Current animations/transitions
- How notes are structured in the DOM
- What CSS variables are already in use

Be very thorough - read every CSS and JSX file related to the notes feature.

content.text: I'll conduct a comprehensive exploration of the ProfilePage notes section. Let me start by finding all relevant CSS and component files.

input.description: List all CSS and JSX files in ProfilePage directory

content.text: Perfect! I found all the relevant files. Now let me read all the CSS files and JSX components related to notes:
Now let me read the remaining note-related components:
Perfect! Now let me check the constants file to understand the default styles and allowed values:
